es.meta.title: Event Scanner - BiuBiu Tools
es.meta.description: Scan and decode smart-contract event logs on any EVM chain. Proxy-aware (EIP-1967/1822/Beacon/1167/Diamond), human-friendly filters, resumable indexing into IndexedDB, CSV/JSON export and live-tail.
es.title: Event Scanner
es.subtitle: Index and decode contract events on any EVM chain — proxy-aware, resumable, exportable
es.cfg.networkHint: Search any EVM chain by name or chain ID. The fastest public RPC is selected automatically.
es.cfg.searchChain: Search any chain by name or chain ID…
es.cfg.abiPlaceholder: Paste ABI JSON (or human-readable signatures), or use Fetch ABI / Detect proxy above
es.cfg.trackWalletHint: Scans both directions: events where this address is the indexed sender and the indexed recipient.
es.cfg.noIndexed: This event has no indexed parameters to filter on.
es.cfg.liveTail: Live-tail: keep watching new blocks after the historical scan
es.cfg.etherscanKey: Etherscan V2 API key (optional, for ABI fallback)
es.cfg.need.chain: Select a chain to get started.
es.cfg.need.contract: Enter the contract address you want to scan.
es.cfg.need.contractInvalid: That doesn't look like a valid address (0x + 40 hex characters).
es.cfg.need.abi: Add the ABI — paste it, or use “Fetch ABI / Detect proxy” above.
es.cfg.need.walletUnsupported: Wallet tracking needs an event with two indexed address fields, like Transfer.
es.cfg.need.wallet: Enter the wallet address you want to track.
es.cfg.fixConfig: Please complete the configuration before scanning.
es.exec.preparingHint: Connecting to the RPC and locating the block range — this can take a moment.
es.results.emptyHint: Try widening the block or time range, or check your filters.
es.results.complete: Complete — every block in this range was scanned.
es.results.gapsWarn: {blocks} block(s) in {ranges} range(s) couldn't be fetched from any RPC — results may be incomplete.
